components.name: Site header
components.description: Site title + primary navigation. Rendered at the top of every page via _layout.twig.

components.name: Site footer
components.description: Closing slab: copyright, secondary links. Rendered at the bottom of every page via _layout.twig.

components.name: Page template
components.description: Single page view — title + body. Used for `pages/*.md` content.

components.name: Post template
components.description: Single blog post view — title, date, body, taxonomies.

components.name: Archive (post list)
components.description: Folder archive — paginated list of posts under a content folder.

components.name: Taxonomy archive
components.description: Posts filtered by a taxonomy term (e.g. /blog/tag/news).

components.name: Contact page
components.description: Page with the built-in contact form rendered via {{ contact_form() }}.

components.name: RSS feed template
components.description: Atom/RSS feed for a content folder. Served at /feed.xml.

components.name: 404 page
components.description: Fallback rendered when no content matches the request path.
